texto: These souls were eternally disconnected, forever separated with a force that would not allow any interchange. They were like another race with no societal tie to each other, bound on their own miserable, independent journeys, alike only in the obvious countenance of pain.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a R. William Bennett: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “These souls were eternally disconnected, forever separated with a force that would not allow any …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, hell, misery pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e viagem.
